item.title: Eastman E20DL acoustic guitar dreadnought rosewood spruce lefty w/case - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: left-handed eastman acoustic, with hardshell case. no trades.

item.title: Left handed / lefty Ibanez RG450DXBL Electric Guitar - $400 (Brookline)
item.description: 2010's left handed Ibanez RG. Has a big chip in the paint on the player side, but other than that it plays great. I can set it up in whatever tuning you want, just shoot a message.

item.title: Eastman T386 electric guitar semi-hollow lefty with hard case - $1,000 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed 335-type semi-hollow guitar from eastman. hard case included. no pickguard. sounds great, no trades, thank you.

item.title: Agile AL-3200 MCC LEFTY Les Paul electric guitar - $500 (Quincy)
item.description: This is a neck-through silverburst left handed Les Paul model from Agile with upgraded higher output Giovanni GCH2 pickups and Switchcraft pickup selector. I will also include a roller bridge with brass saddles from Agile. Not interested in trades at this time.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass guitar LEFTY with case - $1,200 (Quincy)
item.description: Left Handed Am-Pro II J-bass, Olympic White, tortoiseshell pickguard, rosewood fretboard. V-mod pickups. Includes original molded hard case. Has a few nicks, overall in very good condition. No trades, thanks.

item.title: Gretsch G6119 Tennessee Rose Lefty electric guitar Japan with case - $1,800 (Quincy)
item.description: Left handed Gretsch Tennesee Rose with bigsby. This guitar has been thoroughly gigged for over fifteen years. Had a professional fret level and dress, along with a pinned bridge (no longer free floating). Pickups upgraded to TV Jones Classic filtertrons. Original hardshell case included. No trades.

item.title: Framed lefty guitar chords - $20 (Woburn)
item.description: Large. Approx 2'x3'?

item.title: Epiphone Sheraton Left handed electric guitar alnico pickups w/case - $700 (Quincy)
item.description: Rare lefty Korea-era Epiphone Sheraton. Upgraded Alnico II GFS pickups. original hard case included. No trades.

item.title: Agile AL-3100MCC Black P90 lefty wolfetone pickup upgrade with case - $500 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed single cutaway agile guitar with upgraded Wolfetone Meaner P90 pickup. includes hard case. no trades.

item.title: 1980 Lefty Guild D40C with K&K Pickup - $1,200 (Murray Hill)
item.description: 1980 Guild D40C (Left-Handed), rare cutaway model, solid condition with play wear consistent with a player guitar of this vintage, string action is excellent (3/64" to 4/64" high E to Low E at the 12th fret - saddle height is 1/8"), equipped with a K&K Pure Mini bridge plate transducer pickup, sturdy hardshell case with locking keys, $1,200.

item.title: Guitar parts lot - $100 (Millbury)
item.description: Black Humbucker Pickup Set with extra pickup rings

item.title: Guitar parts lot - $100 (Millbury)
item.description: Black Humbucker Pickup Set with extra pickup rings

item.title: Agile 3010 Goldtop P90 with a Bigsby Lefty Left Handed - $750 (Millbury)
item.description: electronics are 330k pots,jack,and switch from Guitar Fetish.

item.title: 1980s Made in Japan Fender Squier Left handed Stratocaster - $1,100 (Scarsdale)
item.description: 1980s Fender Squier made in Japan

item.title: Agile AL-3200MCC Left Handed electric guitar with case pickup upgrade - $700 (Quincy)
item.description: This is the neck-through lefty les paul model from Agile with upgraded pickup selector and upgraded Wolfetone Dr Vintage humbucker pickups with aged gold covers. Purple-black quilt finish. Hard case included as pictured. Here are the specs as listed by Agile:

item.title: Rouge lefty acoustic guitar - $75
item.description: Good shape..some surface scratches. Left handed acoustic guitar.75. dollars

item.title: Warrior Custom Built Lefty 4 String Bass - $2,975 (Stratford)
item.description: Price Drop!!!

item.title: Telecaster Neck Lefty Distressed Look - $60 (Watertown)
item.description: This lefty Telecaster neck has a distressed look but is in excellent shape. Was from a project that never completed. Nut needs to be glued in, has string trees and fret edges will need some filing. Should be able to mount on a righty guitar with a reverse headstock. Feels really nice, $60.

item.title: Dead mint 1970's Fender Lefty Stratocaster - $3,000 (New York)
item.description: No playwear. Amazing condition. All original. Little cool ROCK letters easily removable. Impossible to find close-to-mint vintage lefty Strat. Only the backplate and screws have wear. No oxidation or discernible wear on the rest of the guitar. Original case candy. 3000 no negotiation no trades

item.title: LEFTY FENDER GUITAR NECK/LOCKING TUNERS - $250 (Edison)
item.description: Lefthand MIM fender neck with fender brand locking tuners...some minor fret wear in the cowboy chord area but does not affect playability and have plenty of life left on them...string tree holes are pre drilled. All that's needed is a new nut installed and your ready to go.

item.title: Lefty Kremona Fiesta F65CW - $1,000 (Lavallette)
item.description: I am selling because the neck/nut is too wide for my playing style. It is an awesome guitar.. For a classical player. Basically I got impatient and made an impulse buy. I am trying to get hybrid nylon more suited for the pop and classic rock cover gigs I do. Musician's Friend is listing a righty version for $1,600. I am also open to trades from another lefty.

item.title: PRS SE CU4LDC Custom 24 Left Handed Electric Guitar In Faded Blue Bur - $550 (rockland county)
item.description: A very lightly used left handed electric guitar purchased new for over $900.00

item.title: Orangewood Custom Lefty Ava Solid Mahogony Guitar (Mint) - $695 (Lakewood)
item.description: Orangewood Guitar. Comes with hard case. It has solid mahogany wood top, back and sides. These solid wood guitars do not come in left-handed. I had this guitar professionally converted to be left-handed. My cost for the conversion was $380. It has basically never been used.

item.title: Eastman SB59 left handed electric guitar with case - $1,550 (Quincy)
item.description: lefty eastman les paul in great shape. includes case. no trades.

item.title: Guitar Sale - $1,234
item.description: IBANEZ "LEFTY" full size- 34-inch Bass- Brand New w/ gig bag $ 250-

item.description: PRS SE24 2019 lefty, left handed

item.title: Fender Highway One Stratocaster / Partscaster - $475 (Clifton Park)
item.description: This is a lefty (left handed) 2003-2005 Fender Highway One Stratocaster / Partscaster.

item.title: Gibson Les Paul Standard 50's Left-handed - $2,000 (Hartford)
item.description: Mint Gibson Les Paul Standard 50's Heritage cherry sunburst Left-handed guitar

item.title: Ibanez RG470L Lefty o Jewel Blue o 1997 - $450 (Eatontown)
item.description: This left-handed RG470L is a great player's guitar. Has all the usual earmarks of being a Go-To shredder, pick marks, small nicks and light indents/rubs in the finish.

item.title: Daisy Rock Elite LEFTY - $300 (Walden)
item.description: Top of the line Daisy Rock Elite electric guitar in a rare Lefty model. Brand new mint condition. As it came from the factory ,

item.title: LEFT-HANDED ES 335 - $250 (Hampton)
item.description: Lefty ES335 GROTE with epi pro pick ups and plug in harness. Push pull coil spilters Out put on the rim of the guitar with old epi case. 250 $
